channel.title: X Bookmarks + Favorites
channel.description: Hourly generated X bookmarks and favorites feed.

item.title: @hongming731: 阿里这篇关于 AI Native 时代组织研发的思考非常值得一读。它在思路一个非常重要的底层问题：过去两千年的组织形态，都是围绕人的局限建立起来的。...
item.description:
阿里这篇关于 AI Native 时代组织研发的思考非常值得一读。它在思路一个非常重要的底层问题：过去两千年的组织形态，都是围绕人的局限建立起来的。 https://t.co/e6RORaxtCs
Tweet: https://x.com/hongming731/status/2053314677237846060 Primary URLs: - https://x.com/hongming731/status/2053314677237846060/photo/1

item.title: @opencode: OpenCode Go is currently experiencing issues with DeepSeek models due to an upstream...
item.description:
OpenCode Go is currently experiencing issues with DeepSeek models due to an upstream provider outage. > > We’re monitoring the situation here: https://t.co/vlVwvnpQbr
Tweet: https://x.com/opencode/status/2052687449508266270 Primary URLs: - https://status.deepseek.com/

item.title: @VadimCarazan: the stuff that never gets likes is the stuff that makes the work good color systems....
item.description:
the stuff that never gets likes is the stuff that makes the work good > > color systems. type scales. pattern logic. grid rules. > > nobody posts these, but they're why the final work holds together https://t.co/nUlPsTBhJj https://t.co/V8O5k1gS1e
Tweet: https://x.com/VadimCarazan/status/2052362586654470249 Primary URLs: - https://x.com/VadimCarazan/status/2052362586654470249/photo/1 - https://twitter.com/VadimCarazan/status/2051679802432610411

item.title: @_heyrico: Why hire us for your product design? Because we have a complete product system that...
item.description:
Why hire us for your product design? > > Because we have a complete product system that brings every design we implement to the next level 🚀 https://t.co/TR9vs5TpXH https://t.co/2xLsMieaPc
Tweet: https://x.com/_heyrico/status/2052765030303855070 Primary URLs: - https://x.com/_heyrico/status/2052765030303855070/photo/1 - https://twitter.com/1332370121071816706/status/2052706098046697956

item.title: @steipete: Peekaboo 3.0 is live. Biggest release since 2.0. ⚡ Action-first macOS computer use 👁️...
item.description:
Peekaboo 3.0 is live. Biggest release since 2.0. > > ⚡ Action-first macOS computer use > 👁️ Unified screenshot + UI detection > 🧩 Cleaner JSON across CLI + MCP > 🛠️ Better snapshots > > I started this last year, but the models just weren’t good enough. Now they are. https://t.co/0wvhR0NWOj
Tweet: https://x.com/steipete/status/2053114837698249190 Primary URLs: - https://peekaboo.sh

item.title: @Xudong07452910: https://t.co/Xoeb1YJ9gv
item.description:
https://t.co/Xoeb1YJ9gv
Tweet: https://x.com/Xudong07452910/status/2051891753821556976 X article: https://x.com/Xudong07452910/article/2051891753821556976 Primary URLs: - https://x.com/i/article/2051707444305207297 - https://github.com/badlogic/pi-mono）是一个非常干净的Agent基础包，OpenClaw很多思路都来自它，喜欢极简风格的同学可以从这个起手。 - https://github.com/HKUDS/nanobot）是后来出现的「ultra-lightweight版OpenClaw」，几千行核心代码就能跑完整Agent循环，自带memory、skills、multi-provider，飞书、Slack、Telegram、Discord这些聊天通道都内置好了，扩展性极强。我最后选的是它，省下来的工程脚手架时间至少三个月。 - https://github.com/HKUDS/nanobot - https://open.feishu.cn/app - https://code.claude.com/docs/en/mcp - https://github.com/hxdflying/EvoPaw

item.title: @zodchiii: Anthropic just leaked their 2026 agent roadmap in 22 minutes. Claude team walked...
item.description:
Anthropic just leaked their 2026 agent roadmap in 22 minutes. > > Claude team walked through tools, memory, observability, and the things most builders are 12 months behind. > > The last 3 minutes alone are worth the watch. > > Watch it, then save the setup below 👇 https://t.co/dNk44JHpkJ https://t.co/gImhXKvmai
Tweet: https://x.com/zodchiii/status/2052400272840720565 Primary URLs: - https://x.com/zodchiii/status/2052400272840720565/video/1 - https://twitter.com/zodchiii/status/2052368125480354000

item.title: @OpenAI: Codex now works directly in Chrome on macOS and Windows. It’s even better at working...
item.description:
Codex now works directly in Chrome on macOS and Windows. > > It’s even better at working with apps and sites in Chrome, and now works in parallel across tabs in the background without taking over your browser. > > To get started, install the Chrome plugin in the Codex app. https://t.co/pjtHd9gC69
Tweet: https://x.com/OpenAI/status/2052480800004956323 Primary URLs: - https://x.com/OpenAI/status/2052480800004956323/video/1

item.title: @chenchengpro: Garry Tan 提炼了他在 agentic engineering 领域的核心心法：Fat Skills, Fat Code, Thin Harness。...
item.description:
Garry Tan 提炼了他在 agentic engineering 领域的核心心法：Fat Skills, Fat Code, Thin Harness。 > > 简单说就是三层分离：把需要判断的模糊操作推入 markdown 技能文件（Fat Skills），把必须精确执行的确定性逻辑写成代码（Fat Code），框架本身只做最基础的连接（Thin https://t.co/ptiXjl3fkp
Tweet: https://x.com/chenchengpro/status/2043697811993350611 Primary URLs: - https://twitter.com/garrytan/status/2042925773300908103

item.title: @grapeot: 过去两年 AI 工具最明显的变化，不是 prompt 变得更复杂，而是很多原来要自己搭的脚手架正在消失：提示词技巧被模型吸收，agent...
item.description:
过去两年 AI 工具最明显的变化，不是 prompt 变得更复杂，而是很多原来要自己搭的脚手架正在消失：提示词技巧被模型吸收，agent loop、文件读写、shell、测试反馈、上下文压缩被 Claude Code / Codex / Cursor / OpenCode 这类 runtime 商品化。 > > 剩下真正值得自己维护的，是 domain
Tweet: https://x.com/grapeot/status/2051734189054255164

item.title: @intrfacer: Today is Interfacer's first anniversary 🎊🎊 Quick recap: https://t.co/e0xr7dZzVS
item.description:
Today is Interfacer's first anniversary 🎊🎊 Quick recap: https://t.co/e0xr7dZzVS

item.title: @PaulSolt: 🤯 Mythos is NOT as good as Anthropic portrayed. - Non-standard benchmarks - Training on...
item.description:
🤯 Mythos is NOT as good as Anthropic portrayed. > > - Non-standard benchmarks > - Training on solution sets > - Security concerns are real (but they spent $20k+ to push models to find exploits) > > Don’t believe all the hype. It’s probably better than Opus, but not as good as it’s being https://t.co/6kmAWdM2zk
Tweet: https://x.com/PaulSolt/status/2042577693359603748 Primary URLs: - https://twitter.com/elliotarledge/status/2041602563423051812

item.title: @every: How to set up your own AI project manager, via @kplikethebird: 1. Give it context Feed...
item.description:
How to set up your own AI project manager, via @kplikethebird: > > 1. Give it context > > Feed the agent your OKRs, strategy docs, project briefs, recurring workstream docs, and a stack-rank of what matters most. > > The stack-rank is key. Your agent needs to know which project you would https://t.co/oZm03vmo0a
Tweet: https://x.com/every/status/2051336617609335230 Primary URLs: - https://x.com/every/status/2051336617609335230/photo/1

item.title: @martinfowler: Fragments: open-source framework for prompting patterns, musician sues google for...
item.description:
Fragments: open-source framework for prompting patterns, musician sues google for defamation, apple is thinking differently about AI spending, running LLMs locally, will The Genie be caught in the tar pit? > > https://t.co/xMvZYR4Iia
Tweet: https://x.com/martinfowler/status/2051700087496093774 Primary URLs: - https://martinfowler.com/fragments/2026-05-05.html

item.title: @oasisfeng: 这两天用 Codex 实践了一下 Karpathy 的 Obsidian vault 研究范式，尤其是 raw -> wiki 这个 agent 驱动的信息萃取方式。...
item.description:
这两天用 Codex 实践了一下 Karpathy 的 Obsidian vault 研究范式，尤其是 raw -> wiki 这个 agent 驱动的信息萃取方式。 > > 最大体会是，wiki compile 这个环节，由于难以量化产出质量，成了 agent 偷懒的重灾区。不过我发现 Karpathy 貌似找到了对抗 agent 偷懒的一个 prompt 魔法词 —— 审计 (Audit)。 https://t.co/HqlRitO4Dy
Tweet: https://x.com/oasisfeng/status/2051642553943101632 Primary URLs: - https://twitter.com/oasisfeng/status/2047324395245609048

item.title: @ripo0079: 在中国、銀河英雄伝説是有名吗？

在中国、銀河英雄伝説是有名吗？

At the end of the day, taste matters https://t.co/BV6znXSset

item.title: @frxiaobei: “我希望我的抖音有流量”，其实是在用空转语言跟一个执行系统对话。人还能理解，对 AI 来说等于什么都没说。 SMART 化之后： “在未来 3 个月内，每周发布至少 1...
item.description:
“我希望我的抖音有流量”，其实是在用空转语言跟一个执行系统对话。人还能理解，对 AI 来说等于什么都没说。 > > SMART 化之后： > “在未来 3 个月内，每周发布至少 1 条短视频，其中每月至少 1 条达到 50 万播放，否则视为未达标” > > 这个就是/dbs-goal 的价值。 https://t.co/MCkiYtyIm1
Tweet: https://x.com/frxiaobei/status/2051600089798652126 Primary URLs: - https://twitter.com/dontbesilent/status/2051588974032846935

item.title: @elou: I’ve had the most fun I’ve found in a while noodling over all the little details on my...
item.description:
I’ve had the most fun I’ve found in a while noodling over all the little details on my site. Wild how much pent up creativity was stuck behind minor technical limitations in things like app architecture and deployment. AI is a force multiplier for designers, not a death sentence https://t.co/89ocuRN9BD
Tweet: https://x.com/elou/status/2051292836763762747 Primary URLs: - https://x.com/elou/status/2051292836763762747/video/1

item.title: @yidabuilds: 和我们的判断完全一致， 就是这一波最好的生意是去做to B的业务。 我们之前发现的 包括trustMRR上， 那些几乎最挣钱最轻松的业务都是to B一个单独的领域的业务。...
item.description:
和我们的判断完全一致， > 就是这一波最好的生意是去做to B的业务。 > 我们之前发现的 > 包括trustMRR上， > 那些几乎最挣钱最轻松的业务都是to B一个单独的领域的业务。 https://t.co/6x63FCa0uN
Tweet: https://x.com/yidabuilds/status/2051498115501609153 Primary URLs: - https://twitter.com/AdrianPunk115/status/2051494055692116286

item.title: @NebulaAI: Introducing Mini Apps. A new way to interact with AI agents. No more walls of text. Get...
item.description:
Introducing Mini Apps. > > A new way to interact with AI agents. No more walls of text. > > Get custom apps for your workflows: > > Hiring? A site comparing every candidate. > > Deal flow? A tracker with every touchpoint. > > Running ads? A dashboard for every campaign. > > Live now. Enjoy :) https://t.co/TP2eETHX4x
Tweet: https://x.com/NebulaAI/status/2051793024141721841 Primary URLs: - https://x.com/NebulaAI/status/2051793024141721841/video/1

item.title: @chumsdock: Figma MCP now lets AI agents write to the canvas — not just read it. Here's what...
item.description:
Figma MCP now lets AI agents write to the canvas — not just read it. Here's what actually matters. > > The headline tool is `use_figma`: it executes arbitrary Plugin API JavaScript directly inside your Figma file. This isn't a smart wrapper — it's a real code execution environment.
Tweet: https://x.com/chumsdock/status/2036657119194460217

item.title: @azed_ai: Prompt share: Notion Mono Editorial 💬Prompt: A simple black-and-white illustration of a...
item.description:
Prompt share: Notion Mono Editorial > > 💬Prompt: > A simple black-and-white illustration of a [subject] in [outfit], [doing action], with a [facial expression] expression, in a Notion-style minimalist editorial aesthetic, clean line art, flat monochrome design, simple shapes, subtle https://t.co/XMImkzqhOB
Tweet: https://x.com/azed_ai/status/2051603007109054865 Primary URLs: - https://x.com/azed_ai/status/2051603007109054865/photo/1

Crazy what you can do with Bump Mapping & some SVG filters https://t.co/emBt8U5FUr

item.title: @chumsdock: Figma MCP 重大更新：use_figma 执行任意 Plugin API JS。可创建组件、变量系统、设计系统。每次调用无状态，~15s...
item.description:
Figma MCP 重大更新：use_figma 执行任意 Plugin API JS。可创建组件、变量系统、设计系统。每次调用无状态，~15s 超时，失败原子回滚。后续的算盘：免费账户每月 6 次 MCP 读/写。写入Beta期间免费，即将按量收费。 > https://t.co/nuvDEdadP1
Tweet: https://x.com/chumsdock/status/2036657892280164655 Primary URLs: - https://www.figma.com/blog/the-figma-canvas-is-now-open-to-agents/

item.title: @ericzakariasson: this is cursor team kit: a plugin for some skills we use to build cursor at cursor...
item.description:
this is cursor team kit: a plugin for some skills we use to build cursor at cursor > > skills for verifying changes, driving local tools, and shipping reviewable PRs > https://t.co/8R4XNCUOfe
Tweet: https://x.com/ericzakariasson/status/2051255780167610522 Primary URLs: - https://cursor.com/marketplace/cursor/cursor-team-kit

item.title: @wey_gu: 太牛逼了，没想到把上下文 cost 从全连接的 O(n²) 搞到 O(n) 的工作已经有了（现在只先做了 prefill 的部分还），这个突破影响面太大了。🫡...
item.description:
太牛逼了，没想到把上下文 cost 从全连接的 O(n²) 搞到 O(n) 的工作已经有了（现在只先做了 prefill 的部分还），这个突破影响面太大了。🫡 https://t.co/om55JBMdew
Tweet: https://x.com/wey_gu/status/2051723877550895287 Primary URLs: - https://twitter.com/alex_whedon/status/2051663268704636937

item.title: @Alexjkman: 朋友说她一个月在Hermes上花10W左右 我很纳闷：我一个月才花2000啊，你做什么项目啊 ？ 她大惊失色：别买A货啊，缺钱我送你一个。
item.description:
朋友说她一个月在Hermes上花10W左右 > > 我很纳闷：我一个月才花2000啊，你做什么项目啊 ？ > > 她大惊失色：别买A货啊，缺钱我送你一个。

item.title: @shannholmberg: the 3-layer company second brain blueprint, optimized for agents Ashwin Gopalan's...
item.description:
the 3-layer company second brain blueprint, optimized for agents > > Ashwin Gopalan's company brain series breaks down why, and it explains what you run into the second you wire agents into an organisation > > companies collect artifacts but lose the context. a CRM field tells you a https://t.co/X2o3CsPzxZ https://t.co/Qw9fAa6HnF

item.description:
GitHub地址如下，里面有整个pipeline，除了我正文说的方法，还做了很多一致性的处理，比如颜色背景，防止artifacts和jitter，值得看看研究下：https://t.co/Q1nfqQEHMs

item.title: @Himalaya_bear1: 我投资了不少出海团队。说几句刺耳的： 1....
item.description:
我投资了不少出海团队。说几句刺耳的： > > 1. “国人”为啥叫“国人”，因为他们基本上不知道国人在世界上的位置。他们在现代文化上，没有优势。这和日本不一样，文化是开放体系，国人的文化不是。 > > 2. https://t.co/Ko9v8NIi37
Tweet: https://x.com/Himalaya_bear1/status/2051049296435577265 Primary URLs: - https://twitter.com/bonniewinds0/status/2051008014812139783

item.title: @QingQ77: 野心很大，方向清晰。 SkyClaw 想做的不是又一个聊天式 coding assistant，而是一个常驻你服务器的 Rust agent runtime——你在...
item.description:
野心很大，方向清晰。 > > SkyClaw 想做的不是又一个聊天式 coding assistant，而是一个常驻你服务器的 Rust agent runtime——你在 Telegram/Discord/Slack 里发话，它在后台跑命令、逛网页、读写文件、拉 git、必要时自我修复，尽量做到“部署一次，长期在线”。 > > SkyClaw — 一个常驻服务器的 Rust agent https://t.co/LqFAXUt6bS
Tweet: https://x.com/QingQ77/status/2031660148440408309 Primary URLs: - https://x.com/QingQ77/status/2031660148440408309/photo/1

item.title: @geniusvczh: 要求AI一边写代码一边记录他的决策确实是有用的，gpt5.5一个request跑了6个小时，竟然完全没跑偏，中间都不知道压缩了多少次。而且文档也不用想怎么留下来，做完就扔不心疼🤪
item.description:
要求AI一边写代码一边记录他的决策确实是有用的，gpt5.5一个request跑了6个小时，竟然完全没跑偏，中间都不知道压缩了多少次。而且文档也不用想怎么留下来，做完就扔不心疼🤪
Tweet: https://x.com/geniusvczh/status/2050901508313772356

item.title: @fxtrader: 英伟达CEO黄仁勋批评Anthropic CEO Amodei有关”AI未来几年可能取代50%入门白领”的言论，称这类评论“毫无帮助”。...
item.description:
英伟达CEO黄仁勋批评Anthropic CEO Amodei有关”AI未来几年可能取代50%入门白领”的言论，称这类评论“毫无帮助”。 > > 黄仁勋认为，”一旦当上了CEO，就产生了上帝情结，不知不觉中就觉得自己无所不知了”，应该谨慎行事，脚踏实地，谈论事实。 https://t.co/83U8xVaIHd
Tweet: https://x.com/fxtrader/status/2051601805495374164 Primary URLs: - https://x.com/fxtrader/status/2051601805495374164/photo/1

item.title: @chaosflutt28952: 在通勤路上看完了李宏毅老师最新的“解剖小龙虾”的视频，依旧通俗易懂幽默风趣。对之前有些似懂非懂概念的理解也更清晰了，比如 Context...
item.description:

Tweet: https://x.com/chaosflutt28952/status/2031745028243284272 Primary URLs: - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=2rcJdFuNbZQ - https://x.com/chaosflutt28952/status/2031745028243284272/photo/1

item.title: @GlennGilmore: https://t.co/1j1BS3vn9N This to us, @brick_timber , is not new news but it is welcome...
item.description:
https://t.co/1j1BS3vn9N > > This to us, @brick_timber , is not new news but it is welcome confirmation of what has been happening in this neighborhood for almost 15 years. Covid slowed the progression, but we are back on track in a big way. Also, with the terrific work of
Tweet: https://x.com/GlennGilmore/status/2051023665593221208 Primary URLs: - https://therealdeal.com/magazine/april-2026/not-a-hallucination/?tpcc=sprout_general&utm_campaign=sprout_general&utm_content=1777749104&utm_medium=The+Real+Deal&utm_source=facebook&fbclid=IwZnRzaARkOnpleHRuA2FlbQIxMQBzcnRjBmFwcF9pZAo2NjI4NTY4Mzc5AAEeuBmNLTZVCO6CRFYguGL0lk795cOVc-31gTVfoGzNfuheV3UDDpDClVIiQ_o_aem_1ZTIWkMwndXS9GXDT-Dhcw&utm_id=97758_v0_s00_e0_tv1_a1demo0jgdstw1

item.title: @goodhunt: 鲸鱼兄弟们好，我是做 DeepSeek-TUI 的那个美国佬。 说真的，特别想跟国内的鲸鱼兄弟们一起混——但我的翻墙技能仅限于写代码，微信到现在都没搞定，属实有点丢人。...
item.description:
鲸鱼兄弟们好，我是做 DeepSeek-TUI 的那个美国佬。 > > 说真的，特别想跟国内的鲸鱼兄弟们一起混——但我的翻墙技能仅限于写代码，微信到现在都没搞定，属实有点丢人。 > > 求各位大佬帮个忙： > 1）帮忙转发扩散一下，让这个开源终端工具翻过高墙被兄弟们看到 > 2）顺手帮我验证个微信号，我想建个群，大家一起聊
Tweet: https://x.com/goodhunt/status/2050044127656489095

item.title: @MatthewBerman: 5 BILLION tokens later, OpenClaw is now my company's operating system. I discovered...
item.description:
5 BILLION tokens later, OpenClaw is now my company's operating system. > > I discovered things most people never will. > > (PS I solved the Anthropic OAuth loophole.) > > Here’s exactly how it works. > > 0:00 Intro > 0:16 Email Management > 5:20 Sponsor > 7:02 Inbox Pipeline > 9:05 Multiple Prompt https://t.co/sLEg7tV9qY
Tweet: https://x.com/MatthewBerman/status/2026450191759585776 Primary URLs: - https://x.com/MatthewBerman/status/2026450191759585776/video/1

item.title: @aleenaamiir: Minimal Line + Color Accent Illustrations PROMPT: “Minimal illustration of...
item.description:
Minimal Line + Color Accent Illustrations > > PROMPT: > “Minimal illustration of [SUBJECT/OBJECT], clean thin lines with selective vibrant color accents, lots of negative space, refined composition, modern editorial style, elegant and simple.” https://t.co/VciDancjw5
Tweet: https://x.com/aleenaamiir/status/2049400614195794230 Primary URLs: - https://x.com/aleenaamiir/status/2049400614195794230/photo/1

item.title: @deleted_neko: 我：我们来做个实验，换一个方法实现 Codex：好的，我已经做好实现了（+128 -64），我来检查一下有没有问题 我（脑内）：真不错，效率真高啊...
item.description:
我：我们来做个实验，换一个方法实现 > Codex：好的，我已经做好实现了（+128 -64），我来检查一下有没有问题 > 我（脑内）：真不错，效率真高啊 > Codex：为了避免我们的实验影响到现有的用户，我准备提供一个开关用来关掉新实现（+256 -128） > 我（脑内）：嗯？
Tweet: https://x.com/deleted_neko/status/2050162329279672565

item.title: @sanyi_eth_: 你们玩openclaw的嘴巴可真严啊！ 前几天claude封了auth登录，我说我刚订阅的max钱是不是白花了...
item.description:
你们玩openclaw的嘴巴可真严啊！ > > 前几天claude封了auth登录，我说我刚订阅的max钱是不是白花了 > 结果突然发现，他妈的openclaw可以调用本地的claude客户端，一样可以间接使用claude模型...
Tweet: https://x.com/sanyi_eth_/status/2025975741503135842

item.title: @grapeot: 我最近越来越觉得，AI 真正大的机会不只是让已经买软件的公司更自动化。...
item.description:
我最近越来越觉得，AI 真正大的机会不只是让已经买软件的公司更自动化。 > > 更难、也更大的地方，是那些过去一直停在软件边界外的小生意：比如一家本地招牌打印店，订单从电话、邮件、路边来，每单都要重新确认材料、尺寸、设计、安装和排期。
Tweet: https://x.com/grapeot/status/2050968710056444112

item.title: @Prince_Canuma: One of the reason I built MLX-Audio is because my Dad become blind 6 years ago and I...
item.description:
One of the reason I built MLX-Audio is because my Dad become blind 6 years ago and I promised him I’ll help him resume his favourite hobby of reading books using AI. > > With the new MLX-Audio-Swift he can read the news on his iPhone :) > > Hope it empowers you too @tayarndt! https://t.co/0KNYiXppRL
Tweet: https://x.com/Prince_Canuma/status/2026051860377805300 Primary URLs: - https://twitter.com/tayarndt/status/2025980816183148726

item.title: @cherylnatsu: 看了小米罗福莉那个采访，罗福莉自己说自己天天在用Claude...
item.description:
看了小米罗福莉那个采访，罗福莉自己说自己天天在用Claude Code，我都不知道Claude和Dario喊着封锁到底成功封锁了谁，根本封不住最初想封的人，回头又出个分刷到比Opus略低的蒸馏模型。
Tweet: https://x.com/cherylnatsu/status/2048239139104207061

item.title: @fkysly: Opus 4.7 的黑话让我有点受不了，GPT-5.5 反而讲人话了，能理解了。我今天试试看能不能 Codex 完成所有工作，如果可以的话，就主力充值 Codex 了。
item.description:
Opus 4.7 的黑话让我有点受不了，GPT-5.5 反而讲人话了，能理解了。我今天试试看能不能 Codex 完成所有工作，如果可以的话，就主力充值 Codex 了。
Tweet: https://x.com/fkysly/status/2047533454842376225

item.title: @MinLiBuilds: 年初的时候，我跟朋友说，今年最值得掌握的两个技术，一个是Auto research，一个是 multi agent。...
item.description:
年初的时候，我跟朋友说，今年最值得掌握的两个技术，一个是Auto research，一个是 multi agent。 > > 这个文章把两个技术结合起来了，非常值得参考，跟自己平时用的做印证。 https://t.co/h15xUefc3w
Tweet: https://x.com/MinLiBuilds/status/2049729051959644589 Primary URLs: - https://twitter.com/lawrencew_zen/status/2049482235980714408

item.title: @Prince_Canuma: Day 1 of 3 days of MLX: Introducing MLX-Audio-Swift SDK 🚀 A modular Swift SDK for voice...
item.description:
Day 1 of 3 days of MLX: > > Introducing MLX-Audio-Swift SDK 🚀 > > A modular Swift SDK for voice agents and tasks on Apple Silicon built by @lllucas and yours truly. > > iOS, macOS, and visionOS developers can now build native apps with real-time, on-device audio intelligence: > > 🗣️ https://t.co/GnXTLhhXdp
Tweet: https://x.com/Prince_Canuma/status/2026022469010599954 Primary URLs: - https://x.com/Prince_Canuma/status/2026022469010599954/video/1

item.title: @1weiho: Introducing open-slide - The slide framework built for agents. Prompt your agent, get a...
item.description:
Introducing open-slide - The slide framework built for agents. > > Prompt your agent, get a polished deck. > > $ npx @⁠open-slide/cli init > > 👇 https://t.co/bR3WuQtAjl
Tweet: https://x.com/1weiho/status/2050602481953181968 Primary URLs: - https://x.com/1weiho/status/2050602481953181968/video/1

item.title: @fkysly: 经过一上午的体验测试，已经充值 Codex Pro Plan 了，然后搞上 Sub2API。 全面从 Opus 4.7 切到 Codex GPT-5.5...
item.description:
经过一上午的体验测试，已经充值 Codex Pro Plan 了，然后搞上 Sub2API。 > > 全面从 Opus 4.7 切到 Codex GPT-5.5 了，再也不用忍受什么傻逼封号、网络问题了
Tweet: https://x.com/fkysly/status/2047571947559735698

item.title: @Hacubu: So excited for this - in the past four months I've written all my code using Deep...
item.description:
So excited for this - in the past four months I've written all my code using Deep Agents with: > > - Opus 4.6 > - GPT-5.4 > - GLM-5 > - Kimi 2.6 > - Opus 4.7 > - GPT-5.5 > > Currently using 5.5 as my driver with Opus supporting with reviews. Pumped to make that work even better! https://t.co/xni7evYiRM
Tweet: https://x.com/Hacubu/status/2049539835824873811 Primary URLs: - https://twitter.com/Vtrivedy10/status/2049535740233523600

item.title: @ramin_m_h: MLX king shipped a strong and important SDK: MLX-Audio-Swift. You must check it out!...
item.description:
MLX king shipped a strong and important SDK: MLX-Audio-Swift. > > You must check it out! https://t.co/oUSgZ8g2iv
Tweet: https://x.com/ramin_m_h/status/2026058929348731101 Primary URLs: - https://twitter.com/Prince_Canuma/status/2026022469010599954

item.title: @anshublog: “Agents will generate workflows dynamically. Applications will get thinner. And the...
item.description:
“Agents will generate workflows dynamically. Applications will get thinner. And the systems that manage memory, state, coordination, and history will become more important than ever. > > Which is why I think databases are moving back to the center of software architecture. > > Not as https://t.co/zg0qyykVuH
Tweet: https://x.com/anshublog/status/2050742675763319014 Primary URLs: - https://twitter.com/siddontang/status/2050409724949270783
